title: Step CI Workflow Structure
description: Field structure documentation for Step CI YAML workflow files

children.name: continueOnFail
children.description: Continue workflow execution after step failures

children.name: http.baseURL
children.description: Base URL for all HTTP requests

children.name: loadTest
children.description: Load test phase definitions with duration and arrival rates

children.name: schemas
children.description: Named JSON Schema definitions for response validation

children.name: credentials
children.description: Named authentication configurations (basic, bearer, OAuth2, certificate)

fields.name: tests
fields.description: Named test cases each containing an array of steps

children.name: steps
children.description: Ordered test steps with protocol-specific configurations

children.name: http
children.description: HTTP request configuration: url, method, headers, body, params, auth, captures, check

children.name: grpc
children.description: gRPC call configuration: host, proto, service, method, data, metadata

children.name: graphql
children.description: GraphQL request: url, query, variables, headers
